Bash(cd D:/Downloads/AIML/KhushFus && YOUTUBE_API_KEY=AIzaSyDPPKH27JIWkMK6gn7mu1XDcFAtSdKqYGg python -c "
import asyncio, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from src.collectors.youtube import YouTubeCollector

async def test\(\):
    yt = YouTubeCollector\(\)
    print\(f'API key set: {bool\(yt.api_key\)}'\)
    valid = await yt.validate_credentials\(\)
    print\(f'Credentials valid: {valid}'\)
    if not valid:
        print\('YouTube API key invalid or quota exceeded'\)
        return
    mentions = await yt.collect\(['artificial intelligence'], None\)
    print\(f'Results: {len\(mentions\)} mentions'\)
    for i, m in enumerate\(mentions[:5]\):
        text = m.text[:100].encode\('ascii','replace'\).decode\(\)
        author = m.author_name.encode\('ascii','replace'\).decode\(\)
        print\(f'  [{i+1}] {author}: {text}'\)
        print\(f'       {m.source_url}'\)
        print\(f'       Likes: {m.likes} | Published: {m.published_at}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
